=== rtm37.txt
===================
===================
===================
RTM37
Xacobe Festival
Riazor Stadium
La Coruna

Not LB-2384

Lossless Bob Note for LB-2384

sbd; not much above 14k; excellent sound [A-]; occasional slight harshness; background talking d2t6; (a bittorrent from 10/08 is a not very close eac match on d1t1 with a bunch of static at d1t1 0:00 which is not on LB-2384; described with generic info file with cdr timing of "Disc 1 [49:33]; Disc 2 [49:07]"; hash filenames like "01 Hard Times.flac" )


drop/cut between cdrs


CD1

1 Hard Times (acoustic w band) 2 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 3 All Along The Watchtower 4 Just Like A Woman 5 Tangled Up In Blue 6 The Man In Me 7 Watching The River Flow 


CD2

1 Little Moses (acoustic w band) 2 Boots Of Spanish Leather (acoustic w band) 3 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic w band) 4 Maggie's Farm 5 Ballad Of A Thin Man 6 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic w band)
